meaning: n.(历法)基色娄月(即犹太教历9月,犹太国历3月,在公历11、12月间,共29或30天)
examples: Sure, it's a Jewish holiday. It begins on the eve of the 25th day of the Hebrew month of Kislev and lasts for eight days.
Then, as he approached Kislev itself, the prayers of the Ice Queen were answered and a blizzard struck the advancing Greenskins.
